title: arrhenatherum desertorum
intro: Arrhenatherum desertorum, also known as false oat-grass, is a perennial grass native to dry places in Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The medicinal properties of Arrhenatherum desertorum also provide health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and relief from respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
